name: Mon Space Net Inc.
summary: Mon Space Net Inc. plans to build an online marketplace to sell products and services to its members using a business to business to consumer model in Malaysia. The company intends to launch Mon Space Mall, an online platform that allows third-party merchants, as well as individual users to sell their general merchandise products and services directly to other users. Mon Space Net Inc. was incorporated in 2015 and is based in Petaling Jaya, Malaysia.
